prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022–2025年最低位次约660→626→618→690名，2022至2024年呈逐年前移趋势（累计前移约42名），2025年四川省首年新高考（理科→物理类）后位次明显后移至69 0名，较2024年后移约72名，反映新高考模式下志愿填报策略调整带来的短期波动；2022–2024年本省计划均为55人，2025年增至56人，2026年计划61人，较2025年扩招5人（+8.9%），扩招幅度明显，对竞争有一定缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021–2026年连续 稳居第7名（全国Top 20），顶尖高校地位稳固，对高分考生吸引力持续强劲；2026年高考周期声誉评价偏负面（涉及师德师风事件1起），但2025年周期偏正面（李政道先生逝世与 中科大少年班创立关联，提升学校声誉）；抖音热度总排名第12位（高热），短视频平台曝光量大，报考关注度较高。2021–2025年均无投档断档记录，录取位次稳定性好；第五轮学科评估A+学科8个（数学、物理学、化学、天文学、地球物理学、生物学、科学技术史、安全科学与工程），A学科4个（计算机科学与技术、材料科学与工 程、管理科学与工程、工商管理），A-学科7个，A-及以上共19个，学科实力极强，对优质生源吸引力大。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、人工智能、量子信息科学等热门专 业社会关注度持续升温；本省2026年普通高考总人数535,000人，较2025年（物理类284,789+历史类177,978=462,767人）大幅增加约15.6%，按2025年物理类占比61.5%估算，2026 年物理类考生约329,000人，较2025年物理类284,789人增加约15.5%，考生规模显著扩大，竞争加剧。；中国科学技术大学 位于安徽省合肥市，非本省高校，无本地招生倾斜；该校在四川招生计划相对稳定（55–61人），跨省报考受地域偏好影响较小。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年后移的 基准位次（690名）、2026年扩招5人（+8.9%）的缓解效应、本省考生规模大幅增加（+15.5%）带来的竞争加剧、抖音高热反映的报考关注度上升，以及学校顶尖层次与优势学科 的持续吸引力，预计2026年最低录取位次在，预测最低位次约712名，区间631–793名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 量子信息科学（未来技术学院）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划英才班）（含计算机类华夏计算机科技英才班等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（信息科技方向/集成电路方向）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学）
- 网络空间安全
- 物理学类（含物理学、应用物理学、天文学、光电信息科学与工程）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班类（统计与大数据技术试验班）
- 材料类（含材料物理、材料化学、高分子材料与工程）
- 工科试验班（航空航天、人形机器人、低碳能源技术及安全）
- 核工程类（含工程物理、核工程与核技术、应用物理学）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 中国科学技术大学在四川仅招收物理类考生（首选物理，再选化学），招生专业均为理工科方向。位次在预测区间631–793名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三 档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如630名以内）可重点冲击一档的量子信息科学、英才班等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如780名以外）建议以三档专业为主，确保录取。 该校专业设置以理科试验班和工科试验班大类招生为主，入校后分流，报考时需关注各专业组的具体要求。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 660 → 626 → 618 → 690. From 2022 to 2024, the ranking showed a year-on-year forward trend (cumulative forward movement of about 42 places). In 2025, the first year of the new Gaokao in Sichuan (Science → Physics Category), the ranking significantly shifted backward to 690, a backward movement of about 72 places compared to 2024, reflecting short-term fluctuations due to adjusted volunteer filling strategies under the new Gaokao model. From 2022 to 2024, the provincial enrollment plan was 55 students each year. In 2025, it increased to 56, and in 2026, the plan is 61 students, an expansion of 5 students (+8.9%) compared to 2025, which is a significant expansion and has a certain alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings from 2021 to 2026, it has consistently ranked 7th (Top 20 nationally), with a solid top-tier status and strong appeal to high-scoring students. In the 2026 Gaokao cycle, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative (involving 1 incident of teacher ethics), but in the 2025 cycle, it was positive (related to the death of Mr. Li Zhengdao and the establishment of the USTC Junior Class, enhancing the school's reputation). It ranks 12th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with significant exposure on short video platforms and high application attention. From 2021 to 2025, there were no records of admission gaps, indicating stable admission rankings. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, it has 8 A+ disciplines (Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Astronomy, Geophysics, Biology, History of Science and Technology, Safety Science and Engineering), 4 A disciplines (Computer Science and Technology, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Business Administration), and 7 A- disciplines, totaling 19 disciplines at A- or above, demonstrating extremely strong academic strength and strong attraction for high-quality students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Quantum Information Science continue to attract social attention. In 2026, the total number of regular Gaokao examinees in the province is 535,000, a significant increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025 (Physics Category 284,789 + History Category 177,978 = 462,767). Based on the 2025 Physics Category proportion of 61.5%, it is estimated that in 2026, there will be about 329,000 Physics Category examinees, an increase of about 15.5% compared to the 2025 Physics Category of 284,789, indicating a significant expansion in the examinee pool and intensified competition. The University of Science and Technology of China is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university, so there is no local admission preference. Its enrollment plan in Sichuan is relatively stable (55–61 students), and cross-provincial applications are less affected by regional preferences.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking after the first year of the new Gaokao in 2025 (690), the alleviating effect of the 2026 enrollment expansion of 5 students (+8.9%), the intensified competition due to the significant increase in provincial examinees (+15.5%), the rise in application attention reflected by high Douyin popularity, and the sustained appeal of the school's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is approximately 712, with a range of 631–793.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Quantum Information Science (School of Future Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Plan Elite Class) (including Computer Science Huaxia Computer Science and Technology Elite Class, etc.)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information (Information Technology Direction/Integrated Circuit Direction)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science)
- Cyberspace Security
- Physics (including Physics, Applied Physics, Astronomy, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Statistics and Big Data Technology Experimental Class)
- Materials (including Materials Physics, Materials Chemistry, Polymer Materials and Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace, Humanoid Robots, Low-Carbon Energy Technology and Safety)
- Nuclear Engineering (including Engineering Physics, Nuclear Engineering and Nuclear Technology, Applied Physics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The University of Science and Technology of China only admits Physics Category examinees in Sichuan (first choice Physics, second choice Chemistry), and all majors are in science and engineering. For rankings within the predicted range of 631–793, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 630), focus on aiming for top-tier majors such as Quantum Information Science and Elite Classes. For rankings close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 780), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission. The university's majors are mainly enrolled in large categories such as Science Experimental Class and Engineering Experimental Class, with specialization after enrollment. When applying, attention should be paid to the specific requirements of each major group.

_translation.university_name_en: University of Science and Technology of China
